zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche DE GUINES於大約1061年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯卡拉斯i斯時，她的父親Baudouin de Guînes24歲，母親Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande17歲。她於1075年與Philippe de Bergues結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1112年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: GUINES
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of Irish Guinness, a shortened form of McGinnis . This surname is found predominantly in TX.

variants.name: McGinnis
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Aonghuis or Mag Aonghusa ‘son of Aonghus’ (see Angus ). This is the surname of a chieftain family in western County Down. Compare the Scottish form McInnis , and the variant McNeese . Compare also McGuinness .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche DE GUINES was born about 1061, in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Baudouin de Guînes, was 24 and her mother, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, was 17. She married Philippe de Bergues in 1075. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died about 1112, in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche DE GUINES est née environ 1061, à Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Baudouin de Guînes, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe de Bergues en 1075. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1112, à Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche DE GUINES um 1061 in Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin de Guînes 24 und ihre Mutter Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande 17. Sie hat 1075 Philippe de Bergues geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1112 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche DE GUINES è nata il circa 1061 nel Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin de Guînes, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Philippe de Bergues nel 1075. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì circa 1112, nel Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche DE GUINESが約1061年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスカレイスグiンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin de Guînesは24歳，母Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollandeは17歳であった。1075年にPhilippe de Berguesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1112年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードバーグスで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche DE GUINES(이)가 대략 1061년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 캘레이 구i네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin de Guînes(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1075년 Philippe de Bergues(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1112년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 버구스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche DE GUINES nasceu aproximadamente 1061, em Guînes, Calais, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Baudouin de Guînes, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe de Bergues em 1075. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1112, em Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche DE GUINES родилась около 1061 г. в местности гуiнесь, калеи, пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin de Guînes было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle-Chrétienne Sosa de Hollande, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe de Bergues в 1075 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1112 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.
